title: Delhi University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Delhi University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
